input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A white background containing five scattered colored rectangular blocks at the top and bottom edges transforms into five vertical stripes filling the entire screen. The colors, arranged left to right, are orange, red, pink, yellow, and dark purple. The blocks expand vertically to create a solid, multi-colored striped pattern.</think><answer></answer>

The background retains the checkered floor and distant figures under a blue sky, replacing the previous view of the green character on the sphere.</think><answer></answer>

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] Five scattered colored blocks (orange, red, pink, yellow, dark purple) expand into vertical stripes filling the white screen. [2-4] Stripes vanish, revealing a girl in a white fuzzy hood holding up hands with colorful painted fingers and smiley faces on palms. [4-8] She raises a sign reading "Giulia" in pink cursive, which then fills the screen alone. [8-10] Text disappears; the girl looks at a silver laptop, then sits on a beige sofa in a black top. [10-12] Camera zooms to an extreme close-up of her green eyes and nose. [12-14] Shot widens to show her smiling with a braid, flanked by green pig and red bird plush toys. [14-16] An extreme close-up shows a finger pressing the home button of a white device, with a girl's face blurred in the background. [16-20] The girl, wearing a black t-shirt and side braid, reclines on a beige sofa holding the white tablet; green and red plush toys sit nearby against beige curtains. [20-24] The camera focuses on the back of the white tablet, displaying vertical "SAMSUNG" text and a rear camera, held over leopard print fabric, before cutting to multicolored candies arranged as the number 5 on a white surface.

[42-46] On a white tablet, the game view shows blue blocks on sandy terrain with a transparent wireframe outline, then shifts to a green hilly landscape with trees under a blue sky. The player's left thumb uses the virtual directional pad. [46-50] The setting changes to a darker environment with a deep blue sky. White interface boxes labeled "Delete" and "Menu" appear. A white selection square is visible on the grass. The right hand reaches toward the top right corner. [50-56] A glowing white block is placed on the green terrain. The interface now includes an "Add" button alongside "Delete" and "Menu". A large bright white block dominates the left side as the player interacts with controls under the night sky.

[56-60] On a white Samsung tablet, a game scene displays green grassy blocks and a large white block under a dark sky with interface buttons 'Delete', 'Menu', and 'Add'. Hands hold the device as the screen abruptly turns blank white.
[60-64] A logo appears featuring a stylized face with black curved eyes and a mouth containing yellow, blue, green, and pink teeth above an orange tongue, with text "TOCA BOCA". The graphic animates into a black semi-circle bowl holding colorful shapes, including an orange circle with a straw, while the text and eyes vanish.
[64-66] The bowl vanishes, replaced by a title screen reading "TOCA BUILDERS" in blocky letters. Four stylized characters sit on a red beam against a blue sky background, with a "FOR PARENTS" button in the top left.
[66-68] The title screen transitions to a scene dominated by a bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds, showing tops of blocky structures and a crane mechanism along the bottom horizon.

[70-72] Tablet displays a grid menu where grey loading spinners are replaced by colorful preview images. A finger touches the top-right landscape slot; others show terrains with green stripes and characters on platforms.
[72-76] A 3D environment appears with a brown checkered floor and blue sky. A pink and white character stands centrally as blue square tiles appear. Hands hold the device, thumbs interacting with bottom corner virtual controls.
[76-82] A new scene features a tall coiled spring mechanism on the floor. A blue cube and white wireframe block outline are positioned above. The white outline shifts to align beside the blue cube. In the distance, a blue sphere and small figure stand under a bright blue sky. Hands grip the white tablet bezel.

[84-92] On a tablet screen, a solid blue block rests on a vertical coiled spring on a brown checkered floor. A white wireframe outline shifts position around the block, moving from beside it to the top, then to the front face, right side, back to the top, and finally the front face again. Hands hold the white device, thumbs interacting with lower controls. [92-94] The view changes to an open area with a checkered floor and blue sky. A character stands near a blue block while a blue shape expands on the ground. A green character is visible near a sphere in the distance, along with another character. Hands hold the tablet, interacting with the interface.

recent_thinks: [68-70] The tablet screen transitions from a blue sky view to a menu interface displaying a grid of six square slots. The top-left slot features a white plus sign within a dashed border, while the adjacent slot shows a game preview. The remaining four slots display grey loading spinners. Navigation icons and a trash can symbol appear in the corners.

[82-84] On the tablet display, a white wireframe block outline shifts position, moving from beside a solid blue cube to overlap its left face. Both blocks sit atop a vertical coiled spring mechanism on a brown checkered floor. Hands grip the white device bezel while thumbs interact with the lower screen controls.

[94-96] On the tablet screen, a blue patch of squares on the checkered floor expands near a green character and a blue sphere. The green figure, wearing a white box hat, stands nearby while another character remains in the distance. Hands continue to hold the white device, with thumbs positioned over the virtual controls.

[96-98] On the tablet display, a green character with a white box hat stands atop a blue sphere. The blue square tiles on the brown checkered floor beneath expand outward, changing shape. A distant character observes under a blue sky while hands grip the white device's edges.

[98-100] A circular color wheel interface appears, centering a blue square amidst multicolored segments while a hand interacts with the right side. The background retains the checkered floor and distant figures under a blue sky, replacing the previous view of the green character on the sphere.

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] Five scattered colored blocks (orange, red, pink, yellow, dark purple) expand into vertical stripes filling the white screen. [2-4] Stripes vanish, revealing a girl in a white fuzzy hood holding up hands with colorful painted fingers and smiley faces on palms. [4-8] She raises a sign reading "Giulia" in pink cursive, which then fills the screen alone. [8-10] Text disappears; the girl looks at a silver laptop, then sits on a beige sofa in a black top. [10-12] Camera zooms to an extreme close-up of her green eyes and nose. [12-14] Shot widens to show her smiling with a braid, flanked by green pig and red bird plush toys. [14-16] An extreme close-up shows a finger pressing the home button of a white device, with a girl's face blurred in the background. [16-20] The girl, wearing a black t-shirt and side braid, reclines on a beige sofa holding the white tablet; green and red plush toys sit nearby against beige curtains. [20-24] The camera focuses on the back of the white tablet, displaying vertical "SAMSUNG" text and a rear camera, held over leopard print fabric, before cutting to multicolored candies arranged as the number 5 on a white surface.

[82-84] On a brown checkered floor, a white wireframe block outline shifts from beside to overlapping the left face of a solid blue cube, both atop a vertical coiled spring mechanism, while hands grip the white device bezel. [94-96] A blue patch of squares expands near a green character wearing a white box hat and a blue sphere; a distant character observes. [96-98] The green character stands atop the blue sphere as blue square tiles beneath expand and change shape under a blue sky. [98-100] The view changes to a circular color wheel interface centering a blue square amidst multicolored segments while a hand interacts on the right.

[104-106] On the tablet screen, a blue rectangular block transforms into a long blue cylinder lying horizontally on a brown checkered floor near a blonde character, while a green checkmark button is visible on the right interface and hands hold the white device. [106-108] The interface button changes to a red circle with a white 'X' as the cylinder remains near the character in red shorts. [108-112] The blonde character in a white shirt holds a black rectangular block which subsequently vanishes from their hands, while the cylinder stays on the floor and hands grip the device edges.

[112-116] On a white tablet device held by hands, a blonde character wearing a white shirt and red shorts stands on a brown checkered floor. The character is positioned near a long blue cylinder lying horizontally and holds a blue rectangular block, replacing a black one from before. A red circular interface button with a white 'X' is visible on the right side. [116-118] The rectangular block held by the character changes color from blue to green. The character remains near the long blue cylinder on the checkered floor, and the red button with the 'X' stays on the interface. [118-120] The character continues holding the green rectangular block next to the cylinder. The hands maintain their grip on the white tablet edges, and the red circular button remains visible on the right side of the screen.

[120-128] A blonde character wearing a white shirt and red shorts is observed holding rectangular blocks that change color sequentially: initially red (changing from a previous green), then yellow, purple, and finally light blue. Throughout the sequence, a long blue cylinder remains stationary on a brown checkered floor. A red circular interface button with a white 'X' persists on the right side. Hands are seen gripping the edges of the white tablet device.

recent_thinks: [68-70] The tablet screen transitions from a blue sky view to a menu interface displaying a grid of six square slots. The top-left slot features a white plus sign within a dashed border, while the adjacent slot shows a game preview. The remaining four slots display grey loading spinners. Navigation icons and a trash can symbol appear in the corners.

[100-102] A circular color wheel overlay appears on the tablet screen, featuring a central square that changes from blue to green as a finger touches the green section of the palette. The background shows the checkered floor and distant game characters under a blue sky.

[102-104] The color wheel interface disappears, returning the view to the 3D environment with a brown checkered floor. A character with blonde hair, wearing a white shirt and red shorts, stands next to a blue rectangular block. A green checkmark button is visible on the right side as hands hold the tablet.

[128-130] The blonde character wearing a white shirt and red shorts now holds a pink rectangular block, replacing the light blue one seen previously. The long blue cylinder remains stationary on the brown checkered floor. The red circular interface button with a white 'X' persists on the right side while hands grip the white tablet edges.

queries.question: Where are the green pig and red bird plush toys located within the frame in the scene where the person is smiling? A. Along the bottom edge B. In the foreground C. On the sofa D. In the bottom right corner
